span.p: Drift Axes (each independent — conflating causes alarm fatigue)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
input drift: users ask different things
output drift: same input, different answer (often model upgrade)
judge drift: the judge model itself changed
refusal drift: cheap leading indicator of provider model change
cost drift: quality signal in disguise
fingerprint: system_fingerprint changed → provider new build

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
DEFINE STEADY STATE
faithfulness ≥ 0.9, refusal ≤ 3%, p95 TTFT < 1.2s

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OBSERVE
sample 5–10% traffic, stratified by feature/language/model
run rubrics with cross-family judge model

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ALERT ON DEVIATION
drift > baseline noise → page on-call + open issue
Four Signal Layers (one production LLM call)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
① TRACE
end-to-end shape: prompt → retrieval → tool calls → model version → latency
→ REPRODUCE bugs

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
② PROMPT/RESP LOG
full assembled prompt (system+template+few-shot+user+context) + output
→ EVIDENCE

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
③ EVAL SIGNALS
rubrics on sampled traffic + golden replay + feedback-derived
→ CONTRACT

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
④ DRIFT METRICS
distributions of in/out/judge-score, refusal%, cost, latency, fingerprint
→ ALARM
